ai_analysis:
# Post-Market Debrief – June 8, 2026

Today was a profitable day in isolation (+₹2,108) but masks deeper trouble: you're down ₹4,566 month-to-date on a 33% win rate, meaning your winners have to be dramatically outsized to stay afloat. The oi_velocity strategy delivered exactly that—a textbook PE short on NIFTY 23200 that caught a clean OI unwind, entered at 100, hit target at 145 in 98 minutes for +₹2,865, riding a 7.0 trend score and RSI 37 into a confirmed distribution pattern. That trade worked because you had confluence (C9), regime alignment, and a sharp exit trigger rooted in real market mechanics, not hope.

The supertrend_follow strategy, however, is leaking capital: two SENSEX PE trades today, both sold short despite "MEDIUM" and "HIGH" confluence ratings, cost you ₹757 combined. The first was exited at -₹466 after the 5m supertrend flipped long (a valid defense), but the second was slapped with an EOD close at -₹291 just 6 minutes into the hold—a sign you're either entering trades too late in the session or the supertrend signal quality has degraded. Watch the entry *time* relative to market close tomorrow; if you're entering high-confidence setups after 3 PM IST, you're fighting the clock, not the market.
